programme.title: Rose West: Born Evil?
programme.desc: Unlocking the childhood of Rose West. What was it that turned Rose, at the age of just 17, into the most sadistic, sexually motivated, serial killer Britain has ever witnessed?

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Delves into the gripping real-life stories of the world's most terrifying and prolific killers. From Fred and Rose West to Ed Gein (The Clown Killer) and The Milwaukee Cannibal. Utilizing a combination of compelling interviews, narration, archive footage and stylized reconstruction, each episode focuses on one notorious killer and features authentic first-hand accounts of their behaviour, from detectives who ran the case, journalists who reported on the stories, relatives - and at times, survivors - alongside series experts who provide analysis. These criminologists, crime journalists and psychologists examine how the infamous killers made headlines both nationally and internationally and why they still continue to evoke fear and fascination in the public eye.

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: Each episode tells the story of how an online connection led to murder. Whether it's through online dating, money-making schemes, or the chance to cheat every story is different with a tragic end.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A parolee outruns officers, but his luck runs out. A quarrelling couple attract their neighbours' attention and police are called to intervene. A disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A suspect is taken to jail in his underwear. A suspect takes refuge in a basement. The driver of a stolen vehicle attempts to give an officer the runaround. EMTs work to save a young boy.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Two grandparents are shot to death in their family home. Lt Joe Kenda quickly tightens the noose on a prime suspect, but the case kicks into high gear when he learns that the wanted man is headed for the Mexican border. Then, CSPD responders find a body so badly mutilated it turns the stomachs of seasoned officers. Kenda sets out in search of a deranged maniac.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: On October 9th, 1980, in Santee, San Diego, the neighbours of 20-year-old college student Michelle Wyatt hear screams coming from her condo, but fail to investigate.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: Criminal cases can be won or lost in the interrogation room. Success can bring justice for the victims; failure can lead to the guilty person walking free. Interrogation Raw explores the delicate twists and turns of some of the most fascinating interrogations ever done. Each episode will reveal every tactic, every make-or-break moment that occurs within those four walls. Armchair detectives will feel like they are in the room as the very detectives involved share play-by-play commentary on what is often a high-stakes game of cat and mouse. The tension is palpable since, by law, no suspect needs to talk at all. Those who do can stop at any time. On Interrogation Raw, its a race against the clock and everything is on the line.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: A night out in Miami turns deadly for two beautiful, young women and a popular nightclub owner. With little evidence found on the scene, investigators must rely on a hidden home video camera.

programme.title: Expert Witness
programme.sub-title: Pollen In A Field And Fibres In A Car Crash
programme.desc: Explores the inside stories of how expert witnesses helped solve some of the UK's most complex major crime cases, using forensic science to reveal the clues criminals leave behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. When a forensic geologist compared soil from the crime scene with soil found in the wheel wells of the suspect's car, he proved that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Friends and family indicate that the man suffered prolonged bouts of depression and had spoken of killing himself. But a further investigation reveals that his new wife has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money. The story of how he died is finally decided in court, as teams of forensic scientists face-off to see if the good doctor died at his own hand or was killed by his gold-digging wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record, and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal, double homicide. That physical evidence seemed damning, but it wasn't the only evidence. DNA extracted from a discarded spoon would point investigators in a different direction.

programme.title: Cold Case Detectives
programme.desc: Using modern forensic science, the cold case detectives are on the trail of a child killer in a 60-year-old unsolved murder case.

programme.title: Yorkshire Ripper: The Secret Murders
programme.desc: Among the secret murders explored are Judith Roberts, Mary Judge in Leeds in 1968, a schoolgirl killed in Staffordshire in 1972 and Carol Wilkinson, a bakery worker murdered in Bradford in 1977.

programme.title: Expert Witness
programme.sub-title: Corrosive Truth And A Field Of Evidence
programme.desc: An expert analyzes CCTV to solve an acid attack case, and a pollen analysis expert helps solve a murder.

programme.title: Expert Witness
programme.sub-title: Written In Blood And The End Of The Line
programme.desc: A blood spatter analyst helps prove two men's innocence, and mobile phone analysis aids in catching drug traffickers.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A late-night shoot-out leaves a young man dead in Tulsa, Oklahoma. The investigation leads to a woman from his past./ When a Marine veteran is shot, detectives must determine if it is self-defence.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: The shocking, true-life crime series that tells the story of some of the most sickening acts of familial crime imaginable. No subject is off limits, from incest and prostitution to rape and murder. This is every family's worst nightmares, relived and retold firsthand by the family and friends at the heart of events, as well as police officers involved in the case. Each episode reveals the timeline of events with accurate reconstructions, home footage, family photos, archive news and exclusive access to previously unseen police footage. With expert analysis from forensic psychologist Dr Keri Nixon and psychologist Emma Kenny, we show how the acts of one individual can send shockwaves through the lives of those closest to them. In October 2010, 16-year-old schoolboy Joshua Davies murdered his on-off girlfriend 15-year-old Rebecca Aylward, in Aberkenfig, Bridgend. It came out in the trial that Davies had been plotting to kill Rebecca for some time and with two of his friends had been texting about killing her for a "free breakfast." In fact, around the time he killed Rebecca he texted "you may just owe me a breakfast". It was a story that sent chills down every parent in Britain. Davies had become part of Rebecca's family, liked by her mum she described him as "a nice boy", but he repaid her by murdering her daughter. In this programme, Sonia Oatley, Rebecca's mum, retraces her daughter's steps on the day she was murdered and revisits the woods where she was killed for the first time since the murder two years ago. With interviews from school friends of Rebecca's, a teacher who taught both children and with expert analysis from Forensic psychologist Dr Keri Nixon and psychologist Emma Kenny, we get an insight into the mind of Josh Davies, plus we reveal the devastating impact the murder had on Rebecca's family and friends.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: Tells the stories of ordinary people who come to a fatal end because of jealousy, delving into the true-life happenings and misfortunes of the victims.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: I Used To Use My Brain
programme.desc: A first-time offender regrets his destructive decisions. Nothing adds up when a driver tells police that he's the victim of a crime. A deputy encourages a troubled young woman to turn her life around.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: An officer subdues a combative driver. Drugs are recovered from a certain body cavity. Officers respond to a fight in progress and a brawler is arrested. A kick-door style robbery is investigated.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: Todd Kendhammer calls 911 in a panic, describing a freak accident involving his wife. Police are suspicious of Todd's responses in the interrogation room.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve help investigate the unsolved murder of a young mother-to-be and her unborn child. Did a love triangle lead to this deadly crime?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: Based on the successful series from the UK, this program will look at Australian crimes that shocked our nation. On July 20, 1969, Derek Percy approached 12-year-old Yvonne Tuohy and friend Shane Spiller while playing at their local beach in Warneet, Victoria. He grabbed Yvonne and tried to get Shane to come with him, but Shane managed to defend himself. Yvonne was taken in Percy's car to a remote location where he murdered and savagely mutilated her body. Shane quickly reported several things he had noticed about Percy's car, including a navy sticker which led police to the local Navy base HMS Cerberus. When police tracked down the owner of the car, they located Percy washing his clothes and arrested him. Eventually he admitted to the crime and calmly led police to Yvonne's body. Controversially, Percy was found not guilty on reasons of insanity but was considered too dangerous to ever be released. Since then, Percy has been a suspect in a number of murders and disappearances of other children all over Australia, including seven-year-old Linda Stilwell, who went missing from St Kilda beach in 1968. He was known as Australia's most notorious child killer until his death in prison in July 2013.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Convenience store clerk Dahyabhai Kalidas Chaudhari is found stabbed to death at his job. Police turn to security footage for answers and discover a surprise revelation about the killer's identity.

programme.desc: Kelly and Steve help investigate the unsolved murder of a young mother-to-be and her unborn child. Did a love triangle lead to this deadly crime?

programme.title: Expert Witness
programme.desc: Explores the inside stories of how expert witnesses helped solve some of the UK's most complex major crime cases, using forensic science to reveal the clues criminals leave behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home and never returned. After his disappearance, his wife and friend received letters, explaining that he needed to make a clean break and start a new life. Investigators suspected foul play but, without a body, the case would be difficult to prove difficult, but with the help of forensic science, not impossible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a gas station/convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him, until old fashioned forensic science and space age technology come together to reveal the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A car was found in a drainage ditch and the bodies of a man and woman were inside; both had been shot to death. The car windows were broken and shattered glass should have been everywhere, but it wasn't. A fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer encounters resistance in LA and Oakland to his Vegas expansion initiative. Joe takes a detour with Reggie; Jason blasts Kisan for his lack of transparency; Charles bristles over Larry's failure to give him credit for a lineman he landed; Ricky jumps to conclusions.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Desperate to score a key owner's blessing to bring pro football to Vegas, Spencer and Joe find themselves in a race against the clock involving a pair of equally critical meetings. Spurned by his new team mates, Ricky stages his own private workout, and finds roses aren't enough to appease an angry Amber. Vernon looks for a second chance; tensions between Charles and Larry escalate after a try out for Kisan.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer faces new challenges getting Wayne to finance his Vegas initiative, and ponders his place in the big picture. Looking to mend a long-festering feud between Larry and Coach Berg, Julie persuades Charles to invite both over for a home-cooked meal. Vernon is surprised by an unscheduled visit from a league official. Joe becomes obsessed with virtual reality. Ricky loses focus and pays the price.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: With the owners' meeting a week away, Spencer, Joe and Mr Anderson head north in search of financing for a Vegas stadium. Larry tests the limits of Charles' loyalty and patience; Ricky gets a sobering diagnosis, and presses Jason to close a deal.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer finds himself in damage-control mode after an incident involving Ricky and a brash high schooler. Excited over a possible plum job, Charles bristles over Julie's lack of disclosure at work. Looking to reduce Vernon's suspension, Reggie impresses Candace at the league office. Spencer and Joe find themselves at odds with Anderson over ASM's future.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer gets unexpected info that leads him to reassess his priorities. Joe considers the best way to break some bad news to the ASM staff. Marginalised once again by Siefert, Charles decides to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer learns his master plan to bring a team to Las Vegas may be in jeopardy. Ricky arrives at a crossroads, personally and professionally. Charles sees his wish come true in Miami, but ends up with regrets.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer and Joe get a late game assist in their efforts to win over team owners. After some soul searching, Ricky maps out a new future. Jason gets Charles another crack at a coveted job. Reggie makes an impact at training camp.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer and Joe weigh the pros and cons of acquiring an extreme sport agency; Ricky sets down roots in LA with Amber and their daughter, but finds himself yearning for something else; Charles rallies a group of disgruntled employees as he begins his new tenure with the Rams.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer becomes immersed in a marketing controversy; still smarting from their feud in Miami, Charles agrees to give Ricky a chance, despite his better instincts.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer looks to rein in Lance's excesses; Vernon gets carried away at a ceremony retiring his number at his old LA high school, much to Reggie's dismay.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer and Joe find themselves in a crisis at SportsX. Ricky considers his motivations in ending his retirement. Jason turns to Donna for help.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer looks to elevate the SportsX TV brand, while Joe weighs a new offer. At Jayda's insistence, Spencer meets Quincy. Ricky tries to prove to Kisan he's still got the goods, while Charles is encouraged by Julie to bring more flair to his job.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer recruits Q to help him leverage a deal. With Reggie in tow, Joe talks business with some extreme skateboarders, collectively known as Illegal Civilization. Charles hosts a pre-free-agent reception.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer calls on the Anderson Brothers for help. Joe pitches Illegal Civilization to a major shoe brand. Ricky loses his cool at a neighbour's pool party. Julie accuses an overworked Charles of being afraid to succeed.

programme.title: Ballers
programme.desc: Spencer takes a big risk with the potential to blow the deal. After a heart-to-heart with Ricky, Charles spells out his vision for the team. Joe and Reggie enlist Vernon and Terrell "Sizzle" Suggs, to persuade Illegal Civilization.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: Aspiring comedian Pete finds himself at a crossroads after an emotional crisis. While attempting to find solace at a New York comedy club, he befriends cynical comedy legend Artie Lange, who reluctantly offers him some sage advice and a place to crash.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: While considering his next move, literally and figuratively, Pete is put on the spot when Artie enlists his help in keeping him clean and sober during a road show in Albany with co-headliner TJ Miller. Later, Pete concocts a plan to keep Artie away from the temptations of an ardent fan.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: Pete comes to a startling realisation while staying at TJ Miller's place: that the comic has a hard time 'turning it off'. Later, the two head upstate to Jess's yard sale, where Pete teams up with an unexpected ally to get back a prized possession.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: In an effort to win some stage time at a comedy club, Pete spends the night 'barking', handing out flyers to passers-by, on the streets of New York. He finds himself encountering disinterested locals, befriending some up-and-coming comics, engaging in a turf war with a rival barker, and getting a pep talk from a veteran.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: When Pete's parents decide to come to New York for his mother's birthday, Pete begs Jess to keep up the charade of their marriage. But an incredibly tense dinner reveals some harsh truths about their relationships.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: While guest appearing on Artie's podcast, Pete meets a sympathetic Sarah Silverman, who invites him to stay with her and her collection of stray comedians. At Sarah's suggestion, Pete gets a gig as a 'warm-up' comic, and ends up being tasked with saving the day.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: Pete's warm-up gig on Rachael Ray's show gives him a natural high, but he comes crashing down after a surprise visit from Leif's wife, who pulls him back into the chaos of his separation from Jess.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: After attempt to cheer up Pete goes wrong, Artie tags along with Pete to a baptism. Artie gets insight into religion and God from a woman, and Pete runs into Jess which makes him question how much he is willing to sacrifice for a life in comedy.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: Pete has a chance encounter with famed magician Penn Jillette, who shakes his faith and inspires a questioning Pete to try living with abandon for one night.

programme.title: Crashing
programme.desc: Pete decides to spend the day with Leif, who encourages him to be open to the universe. Their carefree attitude is challenged when the two men find themselves at odds and in trouble with the law.

programme.desc: Breathe Easy, Live Better. Maestro's New Genesis Air Purifier tackles allergies and odours with 5-stage filtration. Clean air, sleek design - it's a breath of fresh air for your home.

programme.title: Jilin Peridot
programme.desc: Coveted for their vibrant and attractive hues, Jilin Peridot are a gem like no other. A gem exuding striking golden greens from north eastern China, it is truly a stunning, exotic and rare find.

programme.title: Black Caviar Handbags
programme.desc: Black Caviar Designs aim to support, encourage, and acknowledge a woman's journey in life. They strive to be the leading designer of fashionable yet functional vegan leather handbags.

programme.title: Blaupunkt Smart Entertainment
programme.desc: Experience the pinnacle of German-engineered entertainment with Blaupunkt 4K Smart Entertainment. Enjoy superior sound and vision for an unmatched audio-visual experience.

programme.title: Silver Jewellery by Danny Newfeld
programme.desc: Discover Danny Newfeld's visionary Silver Jewellery: vibrant history, breathtaking landscapes, meticulous craftsmanship.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Start the day with TVSN! Exciting hosts showcase hot products, offer sneak peeks, and present lively competitions for vibrant mornings.

programme.title: Ciencia8 Skincare
programme.desc: Unlock your best complexion with Ciencia8's professional-grade skincare. Backed by top labs, each anti-aging formula showcases extensive research and innovation.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: How to be Blessed God's Way
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations. Reaching across denominational walls, her ministry is used to spread the fires of revival and ignite a fresh passion in the hearts of believers to go deeper in their relationship with God. Katherine carries a strong prophetic and miracle anointing with many experiencing instant healing in her meetings.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry. Hear inspiration for change, healing, peace and joy through his affective communication connecting you to God, the church, and the world!

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: New Wine and Old Wineskins - Part 1
programme.desc: One of the biggest challenges Christians face is to live a holy life without becoming overly rigid and judgmental with their faith. Today, Joyce discusses the difference between the old covenant law and new covenant grace.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's sudden engagement to a missionary, he embarks on a quest to keep her closer to home. But when his efforts go awry, he must reconsider what it means to be a strong father.

programme.title: The Star
programme.desc: A small but brave donkey named Bo yearns for a life beyond his daily grind at the village mill. One day he finds the courage to break free, and finally goes on the adventure of his dreams. On his journey, he teams up with Ruth, a loveable sheep who has lost her flock and Dave, a dove with lofty aspirations. Along with three wisecracking camels and some eccentric stable animals, Bo and his new friends follow the Star and become accidental heroes in the greatest story ever told - the first Christmas.

programme.title: Long Lost Christmas
programme.desc: Hayley is an interior designer who plans to surprise her recently widowed mother Patricia with the perfect holiday present: the extended family she knows her mom yearns for.

programme.title: Merry Christmas?
programme.desc: For many, Christmas is a time of excitement and joy as loving families share in the festive traditions of the season. But for others, the Christmas holidays are only a reminder of what is missing in life. Merry Christmas? tells the stories of three such people. Sherry was abused as a child and sank into a life of prostitution, crime, and drug use. For her, Christmas was always the time when she hit rock bottom. As a young girl, Mirasel was orphaned after a natural disaster struck her native Philippines. She spent years without the love and support of a family. Vinny, an aspiring rock musician was on the road to fame and fortune until his wife died tragically and he was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, events that shattered him and derailed his hopes and dreams. Yet, through the struggles and pain these three individuals have found the grace to cope with their losses and move ahead in faith. Pastor Mark Jeske of the Time of Grace television program hosts this Christmas special and brings perspective to these stories as he unveils how the Christmas story speaks to hurting people.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: How to be Blessed God's Way
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Bruce and his team will move, inspire and challenge you to live your life to the absolute fullest. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Bruce travels Australia speaking regularly about his experiences in life and in the Church in a way that is both relatable and easy to understand. Bruce's message of power, impact, freedom and purpose is for anyone and everyone - for no matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Christmas Movie Magic
programme.desc: Alli might get a shot at news reporting if she succeed with her Christmas assignment. She's to write about the 65 year anniversary of the premiere of the popular seasonal movie 'Christmas With You'. It was filmed in the small town of White Falls, New York, so she heads there to get more facts on the film. In White Falls she meets Brad who runs the old theatre where the film had it's world premiere. Together they find evidence that the films big star, Walter Andrews, had a secret romance during the filming. But with who? As they start to investigate they might also find romance themselves.

programme.title: Christmas Angel
programme.desc: This Christmas, Olivia has one wish: that her single mum would find someone that she can call 'Dad'. She and her friends discover that the answer to all their wishes may be inside a mysterious abandoned house. Legend has it that if you make a wish, throw a stone and break a window, your wish will come true. Then, within the house they discover Elsie Waybright (Della Reese), the Christmas Angel. Elsie tries to teach Olivia and her friends that some requests must be left to God. As Christmas day approaches, and Olivia's wish isn't going the way she hoped, will Elsie be able to teach her trust in God?

programme.title: Should We Cancel Christmas?
programme.desc: Every year, Christmas gets busier and busier. It's stressful and many people struggle emotionally. In a society that seems to have lost the Christian heritage of Christmas, maybe its time to ask if we should cancel it altogether? In light of this, host Karl Faase, looks at three aspects of Christmas in this intriguing program. The answers are surprising - revealing strong economic, historical and personal reasons why Christmas should continue to be an important part of our Australian community.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Christmas 3 Piercing the Darkness: God is the Most Joyful Person in the Universe
programme.desc: Since 1970 the Hour of Power has been reaching viewers from around the world. Originally founded by Dr Robert H Schuller, the program became the most-watched religious program in the world, reaching 17 million viewers. Now under the leadership of Bobby Schuller, Dr Schuller's grandson. The congregation worships at Shepherd's Grove Church in Garden Grove, CA. The program aims to provide spiritual principles and practices that can help people, as they become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning. To learn more about who they are in Christ through the process of formation, to belong to his family of believers and become a part of the community and to heal as they are loved and then love and help heal others through mission. Jesus Christ ushered in the Kingdom of God into our world through His death and resurrection. He invites everyone to be a part of this amazing movement by trusting and following Him. There is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: New Wine and Old Wineskins - Part 2
programme.desc: Jesus has done so much for us, but we cannot enjoy that until we let go of the old, and embrace the new life Jesus died to give us. Join Joyce today as she shares ways of breaking free from being overly rigid and judgmental.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Christmas Movie Magic
programme.desc: Alli might get a shot at news reporting if she succeed with her Christmas assignment. She's to write about the 65 year anniversary of the premiere of the popular seasonal movie 'Christmas With You'. It was filmed in the small town of White Falls, New York, so she heads there to get more facts on the film. In White Falls she meets Brad who runs the old theatre where the film had it's world premiere. Together they find evidence that the films big star, Walter Andrews, had a secret romance during the filming. But with who? As they start to investigate they might also find romance themselves.

programme.title: Cyrus Nations UK
programme.desc: Covenants, superpowers, promises and betrayal. Thousands of years ago God vowed to Abraham that He would "bless those who bless you, and curse those who curse you" (Genesis 12:3). Many individuals, nations, and empires have put God's word to the test. As one of the greatest superpowers the world has ever known, has the United Kingdom's history proved the potency and longevity of God's ancient covenant with Abraham and his descendants? This documentary film traces the rise and fall of the British Empire alongside Britain's complex relationship with the Jewish People. What was Britain's role in the re-birth of Israel in her historic homeland? How did Britain's rich Christian heritage influence the geo-political factors surrounding the First and Second World Wars? Was the timing and circumstances of the tumultuous British mandate over Palestine merely coincidental? Is the demise of the British Empire a direct result of a forsaken promise? In ancient times King Cyrus had a unique call to restore the Jewish People to their homeland. Is the UK a modern-day Cyrus? Presented by Lance Lambert, the film features interviews with academics and Church leaders, alongside eye-witness accounts, historical footage, and live action dramatizations.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Praise, Prayer & Preaching is recorded live at Wesley Mission, Sydney, Australia. Rev. Keith Garner, an inspiring and gifted teacher who not only wants to influence the world, but to change the world, encourages and challenges us every week to live out our faith in a practical way.

programme.title: Overcomer
programme.desc: Life changes overnight for Coach John Harrison when his high school basketball team and state championship dreams are crushed under the weight of unexpected news. When the largest manufacturing plant shuts down and hundreds of families leave their town, John questions how he and his family will face an uncertain future. After reluctantly agreeing to coach cross-country, John and his wife, Amy, meet an aspiring athlete who's pushing her limits on a journey toward discovery. Inspired by the words and prayers of a new-found friend, John becomes the least likely coach helping the least likely runner attempt the impossible in the biggest race of the year.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia. Gain insight and inspiration through the honest eyes of those directly affected in this compelling series, 'Compassion Stories'. Hear about the journey of individuals and families as they search for hope in their different circumstances of poverty and desperation.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Live Undefeated In Christ Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is an animated action-adventure series about a young spy with a whole lot to learn! He's arrogant and reckless and always insists on working alone. That is, until the day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum! Deb Defrates is not a spy. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow always seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham and his wife, Deb, 20 years ago. They believed that the power of God was evident in their growing church and that His Gospel message should be spread beyond the walls of that church to the world at large. They put their faith into action and purchased airtime on the Trinity Broadcasting Network. PowerPoint Ministries was then officially launched in April 1994. Over the past 19 years, PowerPoint Ministries has grown to an expansive network of local, national, and international television and radio broadcasts. In fact, PowerPoint can be seen or heard by a potential audience of millions of television viewers and radio listeners across the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Iran, Russia, Israel and more. The Ministry has a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living using the most effective means to impact the world, making an eternal difference in this generation.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: If travel changes you then traveling to space changes you completely. We explore the overview effect in which people who travel to space develop a new perspective on what it means to call Earth home. We meet the educators, entrepreneurs and rocket scientists taking the next generation of men and women into the cosmos and learn about the unique ways they will get them there.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Nathan help Tom out of a tight situation, and the town comes together after a setback. Meanwhile, with encouragement from his family, Joseph heals an old rift and Gowen counsels Lucas.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: LIFE, a multi-campus church with locations in Auckland, New Zealand and Melbourne, Australia. Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Everytown Downunder
programme.desc: Everytown Downunder is the mission trip of a lifetime! Travelling through the Aussie outback to coastal towns and Australia's biggest cities, Everytown Downunder has everything you'd expect from a trip around Australia - the outback, crocodiles, unique Aussie characters, Sydney Harbour and more. The series follows Australia's most travelled music evangelist, Steve Grace and his 28 person team on a 25,000km road trip performing 78 evangelical concerts, sharing their faith journeys and experiencing everything Australia has to offer. Along the way, they camp under the outback stars, swim with crocodiles at the top end, learn how to make an Aussie meat pie, and fulfil many life long dreams.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Our enemy, the devil, aggressively works against us, and we need to aggressively work against him. Today, Joyce discusses what it means to live and think aggressively.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA; join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Christmas Movie Magic
programme.desc: Alli might get a shot at news reporting if she succeed with her Christmas assignment. programme.title: Joy to the World
programme.desc: Enjoy the sights, sounds and splendour of Christmas. Featuring the highly acclaimed Sunshine Coast Oriana Choir and the multi-award-winning Brisbane Excelsior Band, 'Joy to the World' will showcase beloved and favourite carols, beautiful and moving seasonal songs and the most joyful Christmas music. Filmed in December 2017 at the Oriana Christmas - Joy to the World concert.

programme.title: Spark Story Bible Adventures
programme.desc: Spark Story Bible Adventures bring the stories of the Bible to life with colourful animation and with Squiggles, an expressive little caterpillar whose reactions put children right in the middle of the story. Spark Bible stories are designed to help kids grow in faith as they explore, discover, and wonder about God's Word.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: This is an action-packed sotry behind "The Salvation Army" and its founder, William Booth. The pub owners and their hired thugs are ready for William and his ragtag followers when they come to chase this preacher out of town once and for all. But William and his "Salvation Army" are not so easily dissuaded! Armed only with Bibles, musical instruments and their unflinching faith in God, they march in to face their most dangerous opponents so far. Who will win the spiritual battle for the hurting souls of this forgotten corner of London?

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Bruce and his team will move, inspire and challenge you to live your life to the absolute fullest. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Bruce travels Australia speaking regularly about his experiences in life and in the Church in a way that is both relatable and easy to understand. Bruce's message of power, impact, freedom and purpose is for anyone and everyone - for no matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Unplugged _ God_s Gift to Busy People
programme.desc: Gary Kent is the speaker for The Incredible Journey. He is an archaeologist who has excavated numerous sites throughout Israel and Jordan. He holds a BA in Theology, MA in Ancient History & Archaeology, and M in Divinity. As an internationally-acclaimed speaker and TV presenter, he has spoken and produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places and natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: The Christmas Train
programme.desc: Taking a transcontinental trip to Los Angeles from Washington DC by train and deciding to chronicle his adventure, disillusioned journalist Tom Langdon finds himself westbound with a variety of characters. All provide inspiration for a story he wants to write in honour of his late father. He begins a journey of rude awakenings, thrilling adventures, and holiday magic as his fellow passengers open his eyes to wondrous possibilities, and the opportunity for love he thought had been forever lost.

programme.title: Sweet Navidad
programme.desc: A pastry chef dreams of opening her own patisserie. Being paired with another chef for a grand event they have to learn from one another and eventually come together to create a truly inspired menu in time for Christmas.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: New Horizons is a teaching series from Gymea Baptist Church, Sydney, presented by Rev Dr Marc Rader. Gymea Baptist is a contemporary evangelical church in Sydney's South. Companion study guides for the series are available on line at: www.gymeabaptist.org.au/newhorizons.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Live Undefeated In Christ Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Our enemy, the devil, aggressively works against us, and we need to aggressively work against him. Today, Joyce discusses what it means to live and think aggressively.

programme.title: You Had Me at Aloha
programme.desc: After seeing cute, producer Paige banter with host applicant Ben during a job interview, the TV network makes them co-hosts for a travelogue for Oahu. But can they work together? Paige and Ben clash over their ideas for production but realise they must grapple with the fact that not only do they need each other to further their careers, but they also balance each other on and off the screen.

programme.title: 5000 Blankets
programme.desc: 5000 Blankets is a heartfelt drama that follows the inspiring true story of a family's journey to bring hope and warmth to those in need. When Cyndi's husband, Bobby, suddenly disappears during a mental health crisis, she is left to care for their young son, Phillip, while searching for answers. As months pass without any sign of Bobby, Phillip and Cyndi discover the harsh realities faced by the homeless population in their city. Determined to make a difference, Phillip suggests a bold idea: to collect 5,000 blankets for those living on the streets. What begins as a small, personal mission quickly gains momentum, capturing the hearts of their community and beyond. As they navigate their own grief and uncertainty, Phillip and Cyndi find healing in their efforts to help others. 5000 Blankets is a powerful reminder of the impact one act of kindness can have and how, even in the darkest of times, hope and compassion can light the way.

programme.title: Finding You
programme.desc: Finley, a talented aspiring violinist, meets Beckett, a famous young movie star, on the way to her college semester abroad program in a small coastal village in Ireland. An unexpected romance emerges as the heartthrob Beckett leads the uptight Finley on an adventurous reawakening, and she emboldens him to take charge of his future, until the pressures of his stardom get in the way.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The best-known Christian evangelist of the 20th century, Billy Graham gained world attention in 1949 with a tent revival in downtown Los Angeles that was scheduled for three weeks and lasted six. In the ensuing 55 years and more, 'Billy Graham Crusades' consistently drew audiences of thousands to arenas and stadiums throughout the world.'Classic Crusades' presents the best of the last 35 years of Billy Graham that brought the message of salvation through Jesus Christ to the world. World renowned actors, singers, athletes and ministers share the platform with Dr. Graham. Also often features the famous sounds of the Billy Graham Choir, George Beverly Shea and Cliff Barrows for an hour of blessing and inspiration to all who watch.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has been meeting the needs of the community since 1990. With a vision for a church that is REAL, RELATABLE, ENJOYABLE, LIFE-CHANGING & UPLIFTING, they are committed to providing church services that will enable you to experience church this way. Linked by mutual vision and values, which are based firmly in the Bible and what the Bible teaches, GGC's mandate is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a relatable and practical way..

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Live Undefeated In Christ Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry. Hear inspiration for change, healing, peace and joy through his affective communication connecting you to God, the church, and the world!

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: 'The Christian View' is a fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrives anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way down a road of desires and intentional acts that bring us to our destination. We program our internal GPS to guide us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading? For seventeen years, host, Mitch Kruse was owner, CEO, and auctioneer for Kruse International, the world's largest collector car sales organisation. Today, Mitch writes and speaks to a wide array of audiences and on The Restoration Road offers sound biblical teaching exploring wisdom, leadership and restoration. Is there anything in your life that needs restoration? Like a classic car that needs restoration, each one of us must surrender our old wreck of a life to the Restorer who desires to return us to His original design.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Experience the wonder of Christmas like never before with a front-row seat to the Nativity story and take an unforgettable journey through the very first Christmas.

They put their faith into action and purchased airtime on the Trinity Broadcasting Network. PowerPoint Ministries was then officially launched in April 1994. programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you know that you can change the way you view life? Today, Joyce discusses ways to overcome your negative past and change your attitude for the better.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Christmas 3 Piercing the Darkness: God is the Most Joyful Person in the Universe
programme.desc: Since 1970 the Hour of Power has been reaching viewers from around the world. Originally founded by Dr Robert H Schuller, the program became the most-watched religious program in the world, reaching 17 million viewers. Now under the leadership of Bobby Schuller, Dr Schuller's grandson. The congregation worships at Shepherd's Grove Church in Garden Grove, CA. The program aims to provide spiritual principles and practices that can help people, as they become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning. To learn more about who they are in Christ through the process of formation, to belong to his family of believers and become a part of the community and to heal as they are loved and then love and help heal others through mission. Jesus Christ ushered in the Kingdom of God into our world through His death and resurrection. He invites everyone to be a part of this amazing movement by trusting and following Him. programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Hosted by historian and filmmaker Dave Stotts, Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: Faith Runs Deep is the new series from the producers of the award-winning program, Jesus the Game Changer. Host Karl Faase travels around Australia, discovering the rich and inspiring history of faith Down Under, demonstrating the depth of influence of the Gospel message on Australia. The team drives from the cities to the outback in an iconic Holden ute, unearthing stories from history and today of people whose lives have been changed by Jesus, and who have deeply influenced this nation. Each episode covers a different theme or time in Australia's history. Hear from historians and academics; remarkable Australians of faith; and Karl and Jane Faase about their own journey of faith.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Ready. Set. Give. Welcome to the adventure of a lifetime: a heartfelt, humour-filled & jeopardy-laced journey around planet earth. Follow eternal optimist, passionate adventurer, and former broker Leon Logothetis, as he circumnavigates the globe in a search for kindness. Leaving his successful but empty life behind, Leon hops on a vintage yellow motorbike for a 25K mile journey around the world. The challenge: he will do it with no money, no food, no petrol, and no place to stay. Everyday he will put his trust and his fate in the hands of strangers. Why? To reaffirm his belief that despite what we see in the news, humans are ultimately kind. For the generosity he receives, Leon will offer his humble stories, sincere thanks and in each episode, he will give one unsuspecting Good Samaritan a life-changing gift. See you on the road!

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: Hosted by Sara Jane Elika Soul Sessions is an exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Powerful, life filled topics are presented in an enjoyable and proven format. Hosts, Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Scaly Adventures
programme.desc: Each week travel with Scaly Adventures to amazing places and come up close with fascinating animals and those who care for them. More than just another animal show, Scaly Adventures features exciting adventures as seen through the eyes of a Pierce and his mum and dad. Scaly Adventures shows what its like to follow your dreams and live a life of passion and purpose. Make every day an adventure!

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: TV One Life is the kind of show that will keep you watching. It's a commercial spoof one minute, a reality segment the next and heartfelt ministry after that. Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations. Reaching across denominational walls, her ministry is used to spread the fires of revival and ignite a fresh passion in the hearts of believers to go deeper in their relationship with God. Katherine carries a strong prophetic and miracle anointing with many experiencing instant healing in her meetings.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: A Merry Scottish Christmas
programme.desc: In 'A Merry Scottish Christmas', estranged siblings Lindsay and Brad played by Lacey Chabert and Scott Wolf, travel to Scotland at Christmas to reunite with their mother Jo, a big family secret is revealed. The picturesque setting, complete with a magnificent castle and festive traditions, serves as the perfect backdrop for rediscovering family bonds and the magic of Christmas. As they navigate old family tensions and new romantic sparks, the siblings find that the true spirit of Christmas lies in forgiveness, love, and the joy of being together. This heartwarming tale of reconciliation and holiday cheer will leave viewers with a newfound appreciation for the enchantment of a Scottish Christmas.

programme.title: A Heavenly Christmas
programme.desc: After an untimely death, workaholic Eve Morgan finds herself tethered to her guardian angel, Pearl, as she learns to become a Christmas angel in Heaven. Despite being the worst recruit in the history of Christmas, Eve is assigned the difficult task of helping a struggling singer Max use his musical gifts to heal old family wounds. As Max begins to overcome his issues, Eve begins to embrace the meaning of Christmas, heal wounds of her own, and perhaps find love along the way.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The best-known Christian evangelist of the 20th century, Billy Graham gained world attention in 1949 with a tent revival in downtown Los Angeles that was scheduled for three weeks and lasted six. In the ensuing 55 years and more, 'Billy Graham Crusades' consistently drew audiences of thousands to arenas and stadiums throughout the world.'Classic Crusades' presents the best of the last 35 years of Billy Graham that brought the message of salvation through Jesus Christ to the world. World renowned actors, singers, athletes and ministers share the platform with Dr. Graham. Also often features the famous sounds of the Billy Graham Choir, George Beverly Shea and Cliff Barrows for an hour of blessing and inspiration to all who watch.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: How To Be Blessed God_s Way Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Courage To Say "No"/The Courage to Face Danger and Death
programme.desc: The In Touch program reaches the world with the Gospel with messages that tackle such issues as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships. Dr. Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching. Dr Charles Stanley is the author of more than 50 books.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you know that you can change the way you view life? Today, Joyce discusses ways to overcome your negative past and change your attitude for the better.

programme.title: The Girl Who Believes in Miracles
programme.desc: Unlike most people, young Sara Hopkins is willing to take God at His Word. So when she hears a preacher say that faith can move mountains, she starts praying. What begins with a mysteriously-healed bird leads to people suddenly cured of their misery and misfortune all over town. But the overwhelming crush of notoriety and media attention soon takes its toll on Sara. Will her family be able to save their miracle girl before it's too late?

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Former marriage counsellor turned fitness instructor Molly White has built a popular brand of workout classes, while her successful wedding photographer boyfriend Nick is branching out into art photography. Molly and Nick are very much in love and about to take the plunge by getting married, but life's complexities combined with wedding planning are making their trip to the altar a challenge. When thoughts of postponement crop up, can this perfectly matched bride and groom work together to make their wedding happen?

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Christmas 3 Piercing the Darkness: God is the Most Joyful Person in the Universe
programme.desc: Since 1970 the Hour of Power has been reaching viewers from around the world. Originally founded by Dr Robert H Schuller, the program became the most-watched religious program in the world, reaching 17 million viewers. Now under the leadership of Bobby Schuller, Dr Schuller's grandson. The congregation worships at Shepherd's Grove Church in Garden Grove, CA. The program aims to provide spiritual principles and practices that can help people, as they become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning. To learn more about who they are in Christ through the process of formation, to belong to his family of believers and become a part of the community and to heal as they are loved and then love and help heal others through mission. Jesus Christ ushered in the Kingdom of God into our world through His death and resurrection. He invites everyone to be a part of this amazing movement by trusting and following Him. There is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of The Ark
programme.desc: An inspirational program with principles for living, and life stories from everyday New Zealanders. Collated with a fresh and dynamic edge, Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles both from the platform, and on location. Impact for Life equips people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: News of a New King Part 2
programme.desc: Everything changed when Jesus was born. It was an event unlike any other in history - one that shook both the friends and enemies of God to their very core. In News of a New King part 2, Pastor Bayless shares how the message of Jesus' birth all those years ago brought everyone face-to-face with the single most important decision they'd ever make-and how it still begs the same question in our lives today. Discover the pivotal truth at the heart of Christmas in this powerful message!

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham and his wife, Deb, 20 years ago. They believed that the power of God was evident in their growing church and that His Gospel message should be spread beyond the walls of that church to the world at large. They put their faith into action and purchased airtime on the Trinity Broadcasting Network. PowerPoint Ministries was then officially launched in April 1994. Over the past 19 years, PowerPoint Ministries has grown to an expansive network of local, national, and international television and radio broadcasts. In fact, PowerPoint can be seen or heard by a potential audience of millions of television viewers and radio listeners across the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Iran, Russia, Israel and more. The Ministry has a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living using the most effective means to impact the world, making an eternal difference in this generation.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Bruce and his team will move, inspire and challenge you to live your life to the absolute fullest. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Bruce travels Australia speaking regularly about his experiences in life and in the Church in a way that is both relatable and easy to understand. Bruce's message of power, impact, freedom and purpose is for anyone and everyone - for no matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: How To Be Blessed God_s Way Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Rack, Shack, and Benny work in a factory that makes chocolate bunnies, owned by Nebbie K. Nezzer. Anyone who doesn't bow down to the giant bunny is fed to the furnace. While most employees worship it, Rack, Shack and Benny cling to their faith.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: Connect follows a plucky school theatre group that aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids are pretty sure they have a clear understanding of everything that happens in 'God's Big Story'. Well...most of it. They do have a few questions, concerns, and outright misconceptions. Fortunately, an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures. And yes, there is a talking sock.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: New Horizons is a teaching series from Gymea Baptist Church, Sydney, presented by Rev Dr Marc Rader. Gymea Baptist is a contemporary evangelical church in Sydney's South. Companion study guides for the series are available on line at: www.gymeabaptist.org.au/newhorizons.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John gets his life back on track thanks to Jude and Pastor Luke, until an unthinkable family tragedy occurs.

programme.title: Dream: Live with Purpose, Learn to Dream
programme.sub-title: From Grief to Purpose with Pau Yin
programme.desc: Dream is a documentary series featuring the stories of diverse people from around the globe, who found purpose when they embraced their God-given dream. Subjects include Grammy Award-nominated artists, a former Sudanese child soldier, a disaster grief counselor, and a young Canadian boy partnering with a Tanzanian girl to bring about change through a simple stuffed elephant.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Host Jeni Molitor, along with co-host Casey Cole travel to the beautiful island of Puerto Rico where they find new adventures, try exotic foods, and have the opportunity to minister to the next generation of young women. The girls venture through the rainforest where they jump off forty-foot cliffs, fish the bay for Tarpon, and snorkel with sea turtles. But a season wouldn't be complete without some delicious dishes like Ceviche, Fish tacos, and of course a little Octopus. Jeni and Casey discuss the attributes of love found in 1 Corinthians and find out more of who God is.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Ironically, in this era of Social Media, people are feeling more isolated and disconnected than ever. Groups like the team at 'Be That' are looking to change this, encouraging Australians to connect face to face and begin real conversations. 'Be That' has assembled a crew of Clinical Psychologists to develop relevant resources to encourage people to gather together and connect through intentional and empowering conversations. The Be That TV Show, created in partnership with ACCTV, shares the real stories of individuals, couples and families who have journeyed through bondage to freedom and inspire others that they too can overcome challenges. Topics are discussed with host Jo Bouris, and regular panellist, Clinical Psychologist, Sarah Harriott. Two guests are welcomed to the couch, who speak hope, life and encouragement through their personal experience. Viewers can then access the topic resources and corresponding questions to start their own journey to understanding and healing: 'Be that' person they were designed to be.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: A feared contract killer, known as "The Queen of the Dead" in Paris' criminal underworld, who refuses to murder a young blind woman on the orders of her handler, finds herself hunted by old colleagues and a determined detective.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on and the skills to use them, The Expendables are the world's last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table. But new team members with new styles and tactics are going to give "new blood" a new meaning.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The Spenglers return to the New York City firehouse where the original Ghostbusters have taken ghost-busting to the next level. When the discovery of an ancient artefact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must unite to save the world.

programme.title: Daliland
programme.desc: In 1973, a young gallery assistant goes on a wild adventure behind the scenes as he helps the ageing genius Salvador Dali prepare for a big show in New York.

programme.title: The Tasting
programme.desc: Jacques is divorced and runs a small wine shop, on the verge of bankruptcy. Hortense, determined not to end up single, walks into his store one day.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Hal plays a game of power and seduction with Rebecca, his dominatrix. On the verge of inheriting his father's fortune and company, he decides to end their relationship.

programme.title: The Innocent
programme.desc: Criminal hijinks and unexpected romance collide when the attempts of a son who, in trying to protect his mother, finds himself in an elaborate heist.

programme.title: Little Tornadoes
programme.desc: In 1971, Australia, a newly single father struggles to weather the turbulence of change, as a new immigrant endeavours to find her place in a foreign land.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: Allelujah
programme.desc: ALLELUJAH is a warm and deeply moving story about old age. When the geriatric ward in a small Yorkshire hospital is threatened with closure, the hospital decides to fight back by galvanizing the local community: they invite a news crew to film their preparations for a concert in honor of the hospital's most distinguished nurse. What could go wrong? ALLELUJAH celebrates the spirit of the elderly patients whilst paying tribute to the deep humanity of the medical staff battling with limited resources and ever-growing demand.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: The Color Purple (2023)
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband simply called Mister. With the support of sultry singer Shug Avery and stand-her-ground stepdaughter Sofia, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible – Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: The Great Escaper
programme.desc: Bernard Jordan, a World War II veteran, sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

programme.title: November
programme.desc: France. 5 days into the heart of the French anti-terrorism services hunt for suspects after the 13/11/2015 attacks in Paris. An edge-of-your-seat deep-dive into one of the most incredible manhunts in European history.

programme.title: My Neighbour Adolf
programme.desc: A lonely and grumpy Holocaust survivor convinces himself that his new neighbour is none other than Adolf Hitler. He starts an independent investigation to prove his claim.

programme.title: Maybe I Do
programme.desc: Michelle and Allen are in a relationship and decide to invite their parents to finally meet. Turns out, the parents already know one another well, which leads to some differing opinions about marriage.

programme.title: Unseen
programme.desc: Sam receives a call from Emily regarding a nearly blind woman who is running from her murderous ex in the woods. She must survive the ordeal with Sam being her eyes using video calls.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Barry uses his superpowers to travel back in time in order to change the events of the past. But when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation, and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. That is unless Barry can coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian albeit not the one he's looking for. Ultimately, to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A Mexican-American college grad's life is turned upside down when a mysterious scarab gives him the ability to generate an exoskeleton suit of incredible power.

programme.title: Am I Ok?
programme.desc: Lucy and Jane have been best friends for most of their lives and think they know everything there is to know about each other. But when Jane announces she's moving to London, Lucy reveals a long-held secret. As Jane tries to help Lucy, their friendship is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: India. When army commando Amrit finds out his true love Tulika is engaged against her will, he boards a New Delhi-bound train in a daring quest to derail the arranged marriage. But when a gang of knife-wielding thieves led by the ruthless Fani begin to terrorize innocent passengers on his train, Amrit takes them on himself in a death-defying kill-spree to save those around him - turning what should have been a typical commute into an adrenaline-fueled thrill ride.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a private security gig for a journalist as she interviews a ruthless dictator. When a military coup breaks out, the trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, the assassins, and each other.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: Freud invites iconic author C.S. Lewis to debate the existence of God, his unique relationship with his daughter, and Lewis' unconventional relationship with his best friend's mother.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: Am I Ok?
programme.desc: Lucy and Jane have been best friends for most of their lives and think they know everything there is to know about each other. But when Jane announces she's moving to London, Lucy reveals a long-held secret. As Jane tries to help Lucy, their friendship is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: Origin
programme.desc: Follows the tragedy and triumph of Pulitzer Prize winning journalist Isabel Wilkerson as she investigates a global phenomenon of epic proportions, who experiences unfathomable personal loss and love as she crosses continents and cultures to craft one of the defining American books of our time.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: Gray Matter
programme.desc: Aurora has known all her life from her mother that the superhuman abilities they have also make them dangerous. Now, Aurora will discover if her mother was speaking the truth.

programme.title: Strange Way of Life
programme.desc: After 25 years, Silva rides a horse across the desert to visit his friend Sheriff Jake. They celebrate the meeting, but the next morning Jake tells him the reason for his trip.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Christmess
programme.desc: A once famous actor is now performing as Santa Claus in a mall because of his alcohol addiction. After meeting his estranged daughter he seeks help, in order to win her forgiveness.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: A Christmas Story Christmas
programme.desc: Follows Ralphie, now an adult, who returns to the house on Cleveland Street to give his kids a magical Christmas like the one he had as a child, reconnecting with childhood friends.

programme.title: Holiday Harmony
