programme.desc: A terrorist group detonates a radiological dispersal device (RDD) in Central London. Due to a lack of preparation, training, and resources, chaos ensues.

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: An officer with the Joint Chiefs of Staff suspects that his boss, a high-ranking general, is plotting a military coup to topple the weak US president.

programme.title: The 33
programme.desc: The incredible true story of 33 miners who were trapped for 69 days following the collapse of the gold and copper mine.

programme.title: October Sky
programme.desc: Coalwood, West Virginia, 1957. Working in the coal mines is an inescapable way of life in this small town. When high schooler Homer Hickam Jr sees the Sputnik satellite in the night sky, he dares to break free of the mines and reach for the stars. With the support of his teacher and three friends, Homer sets out on an inspiring quest to build his own rocket. Overcoming a poor education, a tough father and a series of misfires, Homer turns his dreams into reality in this incredible true story of hope, determination and triumph.

programme.title: Victoria & Abdul
programme.desc: The extraordinary true story of the amazing and unlikely friendship between Queen Victoria and a clerk, Abdul Karim, who becomes her teacher, spiritual adviser, and devoted friend.

programme.title: And the Band Played On
programme.desc: A threat no one dared face. A word no one wanted to speak. A fight for many, fought by few. The story of the discovery of the AIDS epidemic and the political infighting of the scientific community hampering the early fight.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: Blood Work
programme.desc: After a heart transplant, a retired, feeble FBI profiler goes back to work to track down a notorious serial killer who has begun killing victims with the former agent's blood type.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When D.C. Reporter Cal McCaffrey is assigned to investigate the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures. In a town of spin-doctors and wealthy power brokers, he will discover one truth: when fortunes are at stake, no one's integrity, love or life is safe.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Stranded 205,000 miles from Earth in a crippled spacecraft, astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert fight a desperate battle to survive. Meanwhile, at Mission Control, astronaut Ken Mattingly, flight director Gene Kranz and a heroic ground crew race against time - and the odds - to bring them home.

programme.title: Taking Chance
programme.desc: In this uniquely non-political true story about the war in Iraq, Lieutenant Colonel Michael Strobl, came across the name of 19-year-old Lance Corporal Chance Phelps, a young Marine who had been killed by hostile fire in Al Anbar Province. Strobl, a Desert Storm veteran with 17 years of military service, requested that he be assigned for military escort duty to accompany Chance's remains to his family in Dubois, Wyoming.

programme.title: Rocket Science
programme.desc: A teenage boy with a severe stutter is offered the chance to find his voice, and win the girl of his dreams, when he's recruited onto the school debate team on the eve of state championships.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island. As Chuck struggles to survive, he finds that his own personal journey has only just begun.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: Amistad is based on a true story that chronicles the incredible journey of a group of enslaved Africans who overtake their captor's ship and attempt to return to their beloved homeland. When the ship, La Amistad, is seized, these captives are brought to the United States where they are charged with murder and await their fate in prison. An enthralling battle ensues that captures the attention of the entire nation, confronting the very foundation of the American justice system. But for the men and women on trial, it is simply a fight for the basic right of all mankind freedom.

programme.title: Contact (1997)
programme.desc: Astronomer Ellie Arroway is a woman of science. Religious scholar Palmer Joss is a man of faith. They're opposite ends of a spectrum, and sudden players on the world stage as the countdown to humanity's greatest journey begins.

programme.title: Something the Lord Made
programme.desc: Although Vivien Thomas, a black man in the 1930s, is originally hired as a janitor, he proves himself adept at assisting the 'Blue Baby doctor', Alfred Blalock, with his medical research.

programme.title: Confirmation
programme.desc: Judge Clarence Thomas' nomination to the United States Supreme Court is called into question when a former colleague, Anita Hill, testifies that he sexually harassed her.

programme.title: Whiskey Tango Foxtrot
programme.desc: A wickedly entertaining comedy about finding yourself in the most unlikely of places. Stuck in a rut, reporter Kim Baker decides to shake things up by leaving her desk job in New York and taking a dangerous assignment in Afghanistan. Far from home and completely out of her comfort zone, a culture-shocked Kim befriends an adventurous reporter Tanya Vanderpoel, a stern Colonel, and a charming photojournalist to help her navigate this crazy new world. Amid the chaos, Kim discovers her true strength as she risks it all to find the next big story.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Andrew Beckett is an up-and-coming young lawyer who suspects his dismissal from a prestigious law firm may have been due to his contracting AIDS. He hires homophobic ambulance chaser Joe Miller, to sue his former employer for wrongful termination as his old firm is so powerful that no attorney in Philadelphia wants to take it on. For Andrew the battle is clear-cut: he's fighting for his reputation, for his life, for justice. But for Joe, separated from Andrew by a deep social and cultural chasm, there is a different kind of struggle as he confronts his own fears and prejudices about homosexuals.

programme.title: Any Given Sunday
programme.desc: Life is a contact sport and football is life. At the 50-yard line of this gridiron cosmos is Tony D'Amato, the embattled Sharks coach facing a full-on blitz of team strife, plus a new, marketing-savvy Sharks owner who's sure Tony is way too old school. An injured quarterback, a flashy, bull-headed backup quarterback, a slithery team doctor and a running back with an incentive-laden contract also provide some of the stories that zigzag like diagrams in a playbook.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Crime boss Frank Lucas rules Harlem's chaotic drug underworld. When outcast cop Richie Roberts sets out to bring down Lucas's multimillion-dollar empire, it plunges both men into a legendary confrontation.

programme.title: The Jack Bull
programme.desc: After being wrongfully denied justice, a horse trader seeks his own justice on a treacherous rancher.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: Set in South Boston, where the state police force is waging an all-out war to take down the city's top organised crime ring. The key is to end the reign of powerful mob boss Frank Costello from the inside. A young rookie, Billy Costigan, is assigned to infiltrate Costello's mob. While Billy is working to gain Costello's trust, another young cop, Colin Sullivan, is among a handful of elite officers whose mission is to bring Costello down.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Andrea Arnold's Wuthering Heights is an excitingly fresh and distinct take on the classic novel by Emily Bronte. An epic love story that spans childhood well into the young adult years, the film follows Heathcliff, a boy taken in by a benevolent Yorkshire farmer, Earnshaw. Living in Earnshaw's home, Heathcliff develops a passionate relationship with the farmer's teenage daughter, Catherine, inspiring the envy and mistrust of his son, Hindley. When Earnshaw passes away, the now-grown characters must finally confront the intense feelings and rivalries that have built up throughout their years together.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: On an autumn night in 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programming genius Mark Zuckerberg sits down at his computer and heatedly begins working on a new idea. In a fury of blogging and programming, what begins in his dorm room soon becomes a global social network and a revolution in communication. A mere six years and 500 million friends later, Mark Zuckerberg is the youngest billionaire in history, but for this entrepreneur, success leads to both personal and legal complications.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Elwood, after serving his time in prison, finds he is now the lone 'Blues Brother' and is once again enlisted by Sister Mary Stigmata in her latest crusade to raise funds for a children's hospital. Once again hitting the road to re-unite the band for the New Orleans Battle of the Bands, Elwood is pursued cross-country in yet another colossal car chase, led by Cabel the Curtis' son, the Russian Mafia, and a militia group. This time, Elwood has the help of a young orphan, and a strip club bartender.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune. Here's the catch, he will forfeit everything if he reveals to a soul the real reason he seems to be throwing away all that cash. With the help of his pal Spike they set off on a frantic spending spree the likes of which would bring any self-respecting accountant to his knees.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An ambitious genetic experiment takes the wrong turn when two twins - who look nothing alike - are born and then separated. Years later, the unlikely siblings meet: Julius, a highly educated but sheltered giant with a big heart, and Vincent, a pint-sized hustler with an insatiable lust for women and money. With girlfriends in tow and a hitman on their tail, the new-found brothers set off on a wild, cross-country misadventure to find their mother - but end up finding out more about themselves.

programme.title: The Dead Pool
programme.desc: Detective Harry Callahan probes the murders on a celebrity list that sickos bet on to pick who will die next. When he hears he's on the list, it gets deadly serious.

programme.title: With Six You Get Eggroll
programme.desc: Two widowed people fall in love and marry, unprepared for the hostile reactions of their children.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: The Brady Bunch live in the LA suburbs, a community beset by economic adversity, a crime rate spiralling out of control and the challenges of the information superhighway. In the middle of it all, the Bradys live a chaotically idyllic existence with their kids, where '70s values reign. But problems arise to upset this perfect world. Carol and Mike face a considerable dilemma when confronted with an overdue property tax bill.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling biography, Henry Hill is a small time gangster, who takes part in a violent robbery with two ambitious gangsters.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Private Benjamin
programme.desc: An upper-class socialite, disappointed with life, impulsively joins the army. After a disastrous initiation, she finds direction and self-esteem for the first time.

programme.title: The Tuskegee Airmen
programme.desc: The true story of how a group of African American pilots overcame racist opposition to become one of the finest US fighter groups in World War II.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Matt and Christina Drayton are a couple whose attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiance who is black.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: The Dark Knight is back, now battling two supervillains simultaneously, but this time joined by his protege, Robin, to protect Gotham City. They face criminal geniuses The Riddler and Two-Face. Together, these criminal kingpins present a threat that only the dynamic duo, Batman and Robin, can stop.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A big giant head of alien power is heading toward earth, destroying everything in its path. Who you gonna call? Not that whippersnapper Will Decker, that's for sure - even if he is the new commander of a revamped Enterprise. One look at that great ball of fire convinces Captain Kirk that only one man can save the world.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marcellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an ageing boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: International superstar Chow Yun-Fat makes his Hollywood debut with Oscar (R) winner Mira Sorvino in THE REPLACEMENT KILLERS, a fierce and explosive action thriller from director Antoine Fuqua. After he betrays Mr. Wei, the ruthless crime boss who hired him to avenge his son's death, professional killer John Lee (chow Yun-Fat) goes on the run. Enlisting the aid of beautiful document forger Meg Coburn (Mira Sorvino), Lee attempts to return to his family in China before they are victimised by his betrayal. But Wei's army of "replacement killers" is hot on his trail, and now both he and Meg are targets of their impressive firepower. With both sides fully armed and determined to fight to the death, an ultra-violent shootout breaks out when they finally face off against each other.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: The holidays are approaching and the Ubriacco household is wrapped up in more turmoil than tinsel. James has unexpectedly found prosperity and job satisfaction as a highly paid private pilot for Samantha D'Bonne, the glamorous president of an international cosmetics firm. But while her husband is winging around the world, Mollie has to juggle her role as mum with her duties at her new job, labouring as an elf for a department store Santa.

programme.title: Drop Dead Fred
programme.desc: Every kid has an imaginary friend. Only Elizabeth isnt a kid and Drop Dead Fred is anything but imaginary. With a haircut this bad, he has to be real - and his mischief has Elizabeth in big trouble. When she splits with her husband, Elizabeth turns to her best friend. But it's her mum who sends her back home where she discovers her childhood friend, Fred. Having been locked in a box for 21 years, Fred is bursting with energy to turn Elizabeth's life into a rowdy, rollicking, racy adventure.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: Power company repairman Roy Neary witnesses unidentified flying objects in the skies near his Muncie, Indiana home. The encounter sets into action a startling chain of dramatic events. Trying desperately to understand what he has seen, Neary is increasingly driven to the emotional edge by the governmental cover up that's blocking him. With his wife struggling in vain to understand what is happening as their relationship disintegrates, Neary finds an ally in Jillian Guiler, a woman who has also witnessed nocturnal encounters and whose young son has been abducted by the alien visitors. As Roy and Jillian look for an answer to the extraordinary mystery that has engulfed them, an international team of scientists led by Claude Lacombe, a dedicated French expert on extraordinary phenomena, also pursues the truth. As Lacombe and company seek to understand the phenomenon of the skies and look for a communications break-through, their cosmic detective work reaches from the Indiana plains across the world to a remote hillside in India and then to the one place that holds the answer in an ultimate close encounter.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: This film propels you into a future of astounding technology and adventure beyond the human imagination in an extraordinary story. In a future world of runaway global warming and awe-inspiring scientific advances, humans share every aspect of their lives with sophisticated companion robots called Mechas. However, when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family aren't prepared for the consequences. Suddenly, David is on his own in a strange and dangerous world. Befriended by a streetwise Mecha, David embarks on a spectacular quest to discover the startling secret of his own identity.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: The World According to Garp
programme.desc: This story chronicles the life of T. S. Garp, the illegitimate son of a feminist mother, who is a quirky everyman, a wistful writer wrestling with our screw loose modern age.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: The Brady Bunch live in the LA suburbs, a community beset by economic adversity, a crime rate spiralling out of control and the challenges of the information superhighway. In the middle of it all, the Bradys live a chaotically idyllic existence with their kids, where '70s values reign. But problems arise to upset this perfect world. Carol and Mike face a considerable dilemma when confronted with an overdue property tax bill.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime. Inspector Harry Callahan (known as Dirty Harry by his peers through his reputation handling of homicidal cases) is assigned to the case along with his newest partner Inspector Chico Gonzalez to track down Scorpio and stop him. Using humiliation and cat and mouse type of games against Callahan, Scorpio is put to the test with the cop with a dirty attitude.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Max stumbles into a desert city in the post-apocalyptic world that is built on the principle of unbridled, cutthroat capitalism where anything - even a human life - can be bartered. Caught in a power struggle between the city's two rulers, Max breaks the one inviolable rule of a city with no other rules when he refuses to kill.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: With the Klingon Empire on the verge of collapse, the Klingons turn to their old enemy, The Federation, for help. But first, Kirk and his crew must unravel a deadly conspiracy against the peacemakers.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her home town, where she is joined by her boyfriend and learns that he is the crown prince of Madelvia.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Stalkers
programme.desc: Frustrated with the judicial system's indifference towards stalking cases, ambitious A.D.A Julia Winston is determined to establish a task force charged with tracking and prosecuting predators before they harm or kill their victims. However, Julia's boys club of bosses dismisses her concerns as trivial and repeatedly rebuffs her efforts.

programme.title: Engaged to be Murdered
programme.desc: Amanda will stop at nothing to keep her son Jackson from marrying Olivia, who she believes is after his money.

programme.title: Wishin' and Hopin'
programme.desc: In 1964 Connecticut, 10 year old Felix's holiday season is spiced up by the sudden arrivals of a substitute teacher and a feisty Russian student. Based on the bestseller by Wally Lamb.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Based on the fifth and final novel of the Casteel series the prequel, "Web of Dreams "finally unlocks the mysteries of the family. Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her deepest of secrets. Bravely she bore the suspicions of the hill folk, as she tried to grasp the happiness that long eluded her. With a baby girl, Heaven, on the way, she hoped for a chance at happy ever after.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, falling overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia's uncle's secret past is brought to life.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. Erik was an exceptional tennis player and Lyle was studying at Princeton University. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they would have done it? Everyone was perplexed. Was it for Money? For Fame? The case seemed closed, but that';s when the brothers revealed that they were sexually molested throughout their childhoods by their father, Jose. This was the trial that no one was ready for. Our story follows Erik and Lyle as they struggle with their overwhelming guilt, the harsh reality of abuse, incest and molestation that lead them down this path and the trial that shocked an entire nation of television watchers. Never before seen details emerge as we look closer into the lives of the Menendez brothers.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: Known to many as the "Night Stalker", Richard Ramirez was a cruel and prolific serial killer who murdered 14 people and terrorized Los Angeles in the summer of 1985. This film tells the story of Kit (Bellamy Young), an attorney who travels to San Quentin on an impossible mission to clear the name of Harrison Johnson (Hawthorne James), a death row inmate in Texas whom she believes has been wrongly accused of murders perpetrated by Ramirez (Lou Diamond Phillips). Kit lived in Los Angeles during the fear-tinged summer where Ramirez terrified its citizens and confronting him dredges up old and frightening memories of her own past. As the days count down to the Texas man's execution, Kit confronts Ramirez about his unspeakable crimes in search of an elusive confession, plunging into intense psychological depths in her quest for the truth.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with charming, yet quirky real estate scion Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger, darker and more disturbing as time passes. But when Kathie disappears in 1982, her family and friends are deeply disturbed that her disappearance isn't taken seriously by police. While Durst is currently in jail awaiting trial for the murder of his close friend, journalist Susan Berman, the questions linger as to what really happened to Kathie. This film pulls back the curtain on the world of Robert Durst and explores what may have happened between him and Kathie.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Duke University student Miriam Weeks, also known as Belle Knox. From Straight A's to XXX tells the true story of Miriam Weeks, who as a freshman at Duke University looking to make money to cover tuition, became infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym, Belle Knox. The Miriam Weeks/ Belle Knox story represents the hypocrisy of "slut-shaming". Portrayed as neither a villain nor a hero, Belle Knox is a young woman who made a choice that changed her life forever.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate is looking for the perfect match online when she swipes and meets Walker, a wealthy jet-setting art dealer. After Kate falls for the dashing dealer, she learns the dark truth about him.

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: Wrapped Up In Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is Heather's least favourite time of year. As the Manager of the upscale Shops at Town Centre, she has to be the annual Christmas Grinch and cancel the leases of under-performing stores by the end of the year. One afternoon, her 8-year-old niece Molly, asks the mall Santa to help find a boyfriend for her aunt. Unbeknownst to Molly, and Heather, the mall Santa is just a substitute filling in and is actually Ryan, a lawyer-turned-artist who is decorating the mall for Christmas and trying to find his way after quitting his job and losing his fiance. As Heather and Ryan begin to fall for each other, they each don't realize the other's true identity. Will Molly's Christmas wish come true, or will Heather be stuck with another year alone as the Town Centre Grinch?

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Wishin' and Hopin'
programme.desc: In 1964 Connecticut, 10 year old Felix's holiday season is spiced up by the sudden arrivals of a substitute teacher and a feisty Russian student. Based on the bestseller by Wally Lamb.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: The Pregnancy Scheme
programme.desc: Pregnant and newly single, Julia faces a looming catastrophe when she loses her job. An unlikely lifeline arrives in the form of her new friend Alana.

programme.title: Nanny Dearest
programme.desc: Ex-con Taylor tracks down a married couple who received one of her eggs 10 years ago. She becomes fixated on their daughter and will stop at nothing from becoming a mother again.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare as his jealous rage ultimately led to a brutal attack. Incredibly, Grace was able to escape and go into hiding. Fearing for her life and the safety of other women Paul might seduce, Grace works with the police to bring Paul to justice.

programme.title: Framed By My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge by a spurned suitor, and enlists her help to prevent the accusations from going public. June agrees to help him pay off the extortionist, but when the woman is found dead, June becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Feliz NaviDAD
programme.desc: David Morales, an Arizona high school principal and single dad, has lost the holiday spirit after also losing his wife a few years ago during the Christmas season. Now, David will do anything to avoid Christmas so he moonlights as a delivery driver during the holidays. But this year, David's 14 year old daughter, Noel, and his live-in sister, Marissa, are determined to bring the yuletide spirit back to the family and, with a little luck, also help David find love again via online dating. So when Sophie, a witty musician and customer on David's delivery route, swipes right on him, something magical happens between them.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Inspired by Ann Rule's true crime collection Empty Promises. Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness. She accepts help from another camper, a mysterious stranger named Sam and slowly places her life in his hands. But is Sam there to protect Robin? Or does she need protecting from him?

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A workaholic mother gets more than she bargained for when she hires a sought after consultant to help her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay at home mother takes in her struggling friend to help her through a tough time, but soon secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Amish Witches: Story of Holmes County
programme.desc: A reality TV crew moves into Holmes County, Ohio, to document the lives of an isolated sect of Swartzentruber Amish. Production is halted by the death of a Brauchau, an Amish witch.

programme.title: Vanished In Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however when Katrina goes missing deep in the Yosemite wilderness, Jennifer suspects kidnapping and sets out to rescue her sister.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Ashley is a creative writing graduate student who is one thesis away from graduating. Miles Blake, a celebrity murder mystery writer comes to her university to teach. She gets assigned to be his TA.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: When her cheating boyfriend is accused of murdering the head cheerleader, Sophie becomes involved in a race to discover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Zoe Gone
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Jennifer is already struggling with single motherhood when the kidnapping of her daughter, Zoe, kicks her maternal instincts into overdrive.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on a true story. Dave Kroupa is shocked when his new girlfriend, Cari Farver, starts sending him demanding texts. When Dave ends the relationship, he finds himself on the receiving end of an onslaught of twisted messages from Cari, who has abruptly disappeared. Dave's ex-girlfriend, Liz, also begins receiving harassing texts from Cari, resulting in a dangerous situation for them both. Meanwhile, Cari's mother Nancy continually searches for her, keeping the pressure on the police who eventually uncover a shocking discovery. Stars Alicia Witt, Zach Gilford, Lea Thompson, Rebecca Amzallag.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2
programme.desc: Three years after narrowly escaping the murderous clutches of her half-sister Simone, Monica is ready for a fresh start in Seattle as the host of the city's number one prime-time investigative program.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa Banks thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: Angst-ridden over her new mundane small town life, a teenage girl discovers a mysterious boy living in her attic and befriends him. Unknown to her, he is harbouring a dark secret.

programme.title: Stalkers
programme.desc: Frustrated with the judicial system's indifference towards stalking cases, ambitious A.D.A Julia Winston is determined to establish a task force charged with tracking and prosecuting predators before they harm or kill their victims. However, Julia's boys club of bosses dismisses her concerns as trivial and repeatedly rebuffs her efforts.

programme.title: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: A woman and her husband become increasingly scared as an anonymous person begins stalking their family.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A quirky but lovable event planner makes murder as fun as can be. Homicide doesn't follow our heroine, she seeks it out. Using her circle of contacts, her friendship with a cop and the same research skills that enable her to plan distinctive events - if an unsolved murder occurs in Seattle, Carnegie will find out about it.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini goes for a run and doesn't come home. This Northern California missing person case quickly becomes a national story when she returns and her story about being abducted doesn't add up.

programme.title: The Christmas Pact
programme.desc: Can best friends fall in love? That's the question next door neighbours Sadie and Ben will answer as they keep the spirit of Christmas and the magic of their childhood pact alive! When they were eight years old, they planted a scrawny 3-foot tall Christmas tree behind their church and the Christmas Pact began. But as life gets in the way the pact is threatened to be broken. Ben and Sadie need some Christmas Magic to recommit to each other and promise to keep their special holiday traditions. With each Christmas that passes by, Ben and Sadie's Christmas tree grows taller and stronger; and so does their love. The pact bearing fruit to the magic of Christmas and the undeniable answer. Yes, friends can fall in love! love!

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with charming, yet quirky real estate scion Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger, darker and more disturbing as time passes. But when Kathie disappears in 1982, her family and friends are deeply disturbed that her disappearance isn't taken seriously by police. While Durst is currently in jail awaiting trial for the murder of his close friend, journalist Susan Berman, the questions linger as to what really happened to Kathie. This film pulls back the curtain on the world of Robert Durst and explores what may have happened between him and Kathie.
